action.reasoning: Observation: Trained 7 seeds with same config that yielded best at 3 seeds. The current checkpoints_v2 has 7 models. The current best in eval was 0.04689 with 3 seeds (model_0..model_2). I just retrained 7 models (overwrote 0..6). Need to check predict.py to see how many models it loads. meta.pkl says n_models=7 now. Decision: submit eval to test 7-seed version.
